title: HAL storage uses .expect() with peer key encoding
description:
lichen-hal/src/storage.rs:48:
```rust
.expect("peer key always fits in 16 bytes");
```

This assumes the peer key format will never exceed 16 bytes. If key formats change, this will panic silently. Consider returning a Result or using a const assertion on the key size.
close_reason: Added INFALLIBLE comment and doc comment to peer_key() in storage.rs explaining why the expect cannot fail
